commands: echo '=== removing broken postgres bind-mount data ==='
echo '=== rewriting docker-compose.yml with named volume and longer healthcheck ==='

cat > /opt/sakay/docker-compose.yml <<EOF
name: sakay
services:
  postgres:
    image: timescale/timescaledb-ha:pg16
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: sakay
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${PG_PASS}
      POSTGRES_DB: sakay
      TIMESCALEDB_TELEMETRY: "off"
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/home/postgres/pgdata/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U sakay -d sakay"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 90s
    networks: [sakaynet]

  caddy:
    image: caddy:2.8-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
      - "443:443/udp"
    volumes:
      - /opt/sakay/Caddyfile:/etc/caddy/Caddyfile:ro
      - /opt/sakay/caddy-data:/data
      - /opt/sakay/caddy-config:/config
      - /var/log/caddy:/var/log/caddy
    networks: [sakaynet]

  api:
    image: ${IMG}
    profiles: [app]
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    env_file: /opt/sakay/.env
    networks: [sakaynet]

  worker:
    image: ${IMG}
    profiles: [app]
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    env_file: /opt/sakay/.env
    command: ["node", "dist/workers/index.js"]
    networks: [sakaynet]

volumes:
  postgres_data:

networks:
  sakaynet:
    driver: bridge
EOF
echo '=== bringing postgres + caddy back up ==='
echo '=== waiting for postgres health (up to 150s) ==='
for i in $(seq 1 30); do st=$(docker inspect sakay-postgres-1 --format '{{.State.Health.Status}}' 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); echo "  [$i] $st"; [ "$st" = "healthy" ] && break; sleep 5; done
